definitions.text: Physically over; on top of; worn on top of, said of clothing. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
examples: He always put his coat on above his sweater.

definitions.text: In or to a higher place; higher than; on or over the upper surface.
Directly overhead; vertically on top of.
Higher in the same page; earlier in the order as far as writing products go.
Into or from heaven; in the sky.
examples: He’s in a better place now, floating free as the clouds above.

definitions.text: Being located higher on the same page or on a preceding page.
Something, especially a person's name in legal documents, that appears higher on the same page or on a preceding page. (Can we add an example for this sense?)
